title: Dichpally Ramalayam
tagline: Dichpally Ramalayam — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Dichpally Ramalayam is a Lord Rama temple located in Dichpally Village of Nizamabad, Telangana built in 14th century by Kakatiya kings.
overview.description: Dichpally Ramalayam is a Lord Rama temple located in Dichpally Village of Nizamabad, Telangana built in 14th century by Kakatiya kings. As the temple has a lot of resemblance in its style and structure, it is also called the Indhoor Khajuraho or the Khajuraho of Nizamabad.

topPlaces.name: Karadpally
topPlaces.description: Karadpally is a village and gram panchayat in Kamareddy district, Telangana, India. The main city for this village is Hyderabad, about 140 kilometres (87 mi) away.

items.note: Karadpally is a village and gram panchayat in Kamareddy district, Telangana, India. The main city for this village is Hyderabad, about 140 kilometres (87 mi) away.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dichpally Ramalayam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dichpally Ramalayam is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dichpally Ramalayam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dichpally Ramalayam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dichpally Ramalayam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dichpally Ramalayam?
faq.a: Stays in Dichpally Ramalayam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
